title: APM: Session Hijacking - Rapid Session Changes
description: Detects rapid session ID changes within a single trace or from a single IP, indicating potential session hijacking, session fixation, or cookie theft. Multiple distinct session IDs per source within a short window is anomalous.
query: ('Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' or 'Log Source' = 'octo-drone-shop' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') and (('Span Name' like '*HTTP*'))
